title: acmella grisea
intro: Acmella grisea, also known as the parlor plant or bitter button, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family. The plant's leaves and stems are used in traditional medicine, and it is valued for its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Acmella grisea include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, soothe digestive issues, and combat bacterial infections. Acmella grisea can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil for medicinal use, and it is also used in traditional cooking in some parts of the world.
